title: Our Favorite Song
content: While shopping at a small market, Sophie suddenly heard her favorite song playing through the speakers. She smiled as Henry quietly reached for her hand. They began dancing together between the aisles, making nearby shoppers laugh. The song lasted only a few minutes, but it created another special memory for them. From that day on, every time they heard the melody, they remembered the little dance that turned an ordinary shopping trip into something unforgettable.
